content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 4, 0), (2, 7, 0), (5, 8, 3), (0, 1, 6), (1, 2, 6), (1, 4, 6), (4, 6, 8), (6, 7, 8), (2, 5, 9), (2, 9, 10), (0, 2, 13), (2, 8, 14), (0, 5, 15), (1, 9, 19), (4, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 8.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 4, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (2, 7, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (5, 8, 3) has node 5 and time 3. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 1, 6) has node 0 and time 6. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 2, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 4, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 6, 8) has node 4 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 7, 8) has node 6 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 5, 9) has node 2 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 9, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 2, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 8, 14) has node 2 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 5, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 9, 19) has node 1 and time 19. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 8, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 8.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 4 at time 8.

Answer: [4, 6, 7, 8, 9]
